name: Indiana Jones and the Great Circle (Eclipse perf)
aliases: Indiana Jones and the Great Circle
post_apply_message: SAVE WARNING (exe-swap): this mod REPLACES the game executable, so the game's build changes. An existing save made on your installed build may be rejected as 'for another version'. Apply this BEFORE starting a save (or on a fresh save); if a save breaks, Revert restores your original exe and the save works again. Eclipse perf mod. Recommended Deck settings: 1280x800, fullscreen, FOV 90, texture pool LOW, decals/reflections low, sharpening 70. idTech (no d3d12 proxy). Optional: delete *hq* files + hqdb_marker.txt from base/ to save disk. Eclipse's tested Deck setup: GE-Proton (10-15+), TDP 18, GPU 1800, undervolt -50, SDWEAK. Mod targets a specific game build — if the game updates past it the modded exe can crash; Revert restores stock, then wait for a mod update. Files are NOT in git; stage into local-payloads first.
notes: Eclipse Steam Deck graphics-opt mod. Manifest-only on git; mod files (modified game exe/paks) live in local-payloads off git. Stage with tools/stage-eclipse.py, which copies the 'For licence/Indiana Jones and the Great Circle' variant from the .rar into payload/mod/. Then Apply copies over the game dir, backing up replaced files.
